name: Scrambled Eggs and Ham
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Boiled Ham Cut Into Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 7-inch pie plate, combine ham, green onion, butter or margarine, and basil.
2. Cook on 100% power for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until the mixture is heated through.
3. Meanwhile, stir together beaten eggs and milk.
4. Pour over the ham mixture in the pie plate.
5. Cook on 50% power for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring several times during cooking until the eggs are nearly set.
6. Sprinkle with cheese.
7. Cook on 100% power for 30 seconds to 1 minute more or until the cheese is just melted.
